query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A low-angle nighttime photograph looking upward at the Chrysler Building and neighboring skyscrapers in a dense urban environment. The art deco crown and spire of the central tower rise through hazy fog. Rows of illuminated windows glow against the dark facades of surrounding high-rise buildings. A bright artificial light source appears in the upper right corner. The perspective emphasizes the vertical scale and density of the cityscape.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A low-angle nighttime photograph looking upward at the Chrysler Building and neighboring skyscrapers in a dense urban environment. The art deco crown and spire of the central tower rise through hazy fog. Rows of illuminated windows glow against the dark facades of surrounding high-rise buildings. A bright artificial light source appears in the upper right corner. The image is rendered in muted, desaturated tones with an oppressive, gloomy atmosphere that evokes urban dread and unease.
